parents.subject: LU-9003 mdc: support posix_acl_valid with user namespace

commit.subject: ATM-402 - Test on staging
commit.message:
ATM-402 - Test on staging

Change to test the latest autotest deploy


Test-Parameters: fortestonly clientselinux=true testlist=runtests,sanity-selinux
Test-Parameters: clientselinux=true testlist=runtests
Test-Parameters: clientdistro=el7 serverdistro=el7 clientcount=2 mdscount=1 osscount=1 testgroup=review-ldiskfs

Change-Id: I940129b4878b95d0fe8057ea076df0ff981e9a9b
Signed-off-by: colmstea <charlie.olmstead@intel.com>
